'''davama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabedon|kabedon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabedon|kabedon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| davama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dævæmæth|dævæmæth]] || [[word:dævæmæj|dævæmæj]] || [[word:dævæmæsh|dævæmæsh]] || [[word:dævæmæ|dævæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:davavamath|davavamath]] || [[word:davavamaj|davavamaj]] || [[word:davavamash|davavamash]] || [[word:davavama|davavama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:davamath|davamath]] || [[word:davamaj|davamaj]] || [[word:davamash|davamash]] || [[word:davama|davama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:davafmath|davafmath]] || [[word:davafmaj|davafmaj]] || [[word:davafmash|davafmash]] || [[word:davafmaf|davafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:davamatha|davamatha]] || [[word:davamaja|davamaja]] || [[word:davamasha|davamasha]] || [[word:davamaka|davamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:davamath|davamath]] || [[word:davamaj|davamaj]] || [[word:davamash|davamash]] || [[word:davama|davama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:davamathal|davamathal]] || [[word:davamajal|davamajal]] || [[word:davamashal|davamashal]] || [[word:davamakal|davamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:davamathatha|davamathatha]] || [[word:davamajaja|davamajaja]] || [[word:davamashasha|davamashasha]] || [[word:davamaka|davamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:davamathan|davamathan]] || [[word:davamajan|davamajan]] || [[word:davamashan|davamashan]] || [[word:davamakan|davamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:davamathaoro|davamathaoro]] || [[word:davamajaoro|davamajaoro]] || [[word:davamashaoro|davamashaoro]] || [[word:davamakaoro|davamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
